requirement: Buyer can initiate the supplier onboarding process by providing basic information.
Supplier onboarding process undergoes internal approval workflow.
Approved supplier receives invitation to register with AECI and complete due diligence steps.
Supplier information is accurate and current.
Supplier participation is ensured through multiple channels of managing information.
Supplier status can be managed, including purchase block, payment block, supplier deactivation, and reactivation.
Approval workflows involve Procurement, Finance, General Accounting, and Master Data teams.
Integration touchpoints exist between Coupa SIM and SAP for supplier creation, updates, and activation.
Internal users can register new suppliers in Coupa for urgent or business-critical situations, adhering to governance and approval controls.
Internal users can update existing supplier information in Coupa, including status changes.
Internal users can extend supplier contracts in Coupa.
Internal users can create one-time vendors in Coupa with a simplified approval flow and reduced data requirements.
Users can view supplier portal status in the Suppliers table.
Coupa supports auto-translation of standard information on the user interface for multiple languages.
